prose: **Aniline frontier-orbital gap (HOMO–LUMO):** 5.305 eV, computed by DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard, PySCF) in the gas phase at the user-supplied geometry (charge 0, multiplicity 1, neutral singlet). SCF converged in 9 cycles. This is a Koopmans-style orbital-energy difference, not a vertical excitation energy; HOMO = −5.554 eV, LUMO = −0.249 eV. No warnings. All integrity checks passed.
